scripts.vercel-build: prisma generate --schema server/prisma/schema.prisma && (prisma db push --schema server/prisma/schema.prisma --skip-generate --accept-data-loss || echo '⚠ prisma db push skipped — set DATABASE_URL in Vercel and redeploy') && npm run build --workspace front && npm run build --workspace cms && node scripts/assemble.mjs
